description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a simple rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly smooth and feature a mix of dark and light color schemes, with large windows on one side allowing ample natural light into the main living area. The interior layout is visible, showing a living room with furniture, a bedroom, and a bathroom, all arranged efficiently within the limited space. There is a single main entrance door and a small set of steps leading up to it, with no visible porch or veranda. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a prominent set of grouped windows on one facade and smaller, isolated windows on the others. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban neighborhoods or compact residential plots.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large grouped windows on one side, and a minimalistic, compact layout. The exterior features a mix of dark and light surfaces with visible interior furnishings.
description_view_0: The main entrance and a small set of steps are visible, with a dark exterior wall and a glimpse of the living area through the windows.
description_view_1: This angle shows the interior layout more clearly, including the living room and bedroom, with light-colored exterior walls and grouped windows.
description_view_2: The rear facade features a large set of grouped windows and a flat roof, with minimal exterior detailing and no visible entrance.
description_view_3: A side view highlighting the secondary entrance area, dark exterior walls, and a partial view of the interior spaces.
